name: hcportal_getLandingPageData
description: Returns landing page data for an authenticated portal user. Updates the FCM token on the device if changed (after validation), logs portal access, and returns the user's profile and list of kennels the user follows with membership status and kennel details.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: the user's public hasher ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Also used to look up user profile and kennel list.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: fcmToken
parameters.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications. If the stored value differs from this, the Device record is updated.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The device ID for the portal session. Used to update the FCM token if changed.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: UserProfile
rowsets.description: User profile information. Single row returned on success.

columns.name: firstName
columns.description: User's first name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: lastName
columns.description: User's last name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: hashName
columns.description: User's hash name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: User's display name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

rowsets.name: KennelList
rowsets.description: List of kennels the user is following (HasherKennelMap.Following = 1). Joins Hasher, HasherKennelMap, Kennel, City, Country tables.

columns.name: defaultCurrencySymbol
columns.description: Currency symbol, coalesced from Kennel.CurrencySymbol then Country.CurrencySymbol

columns.name: defaultDigitsAfterDecimal
columns.description: Digits after decimal for currency display, coalesced from Kennel.DigitsAfterDecimal then Country.DigitsAfterDecimal

columns.name: defaultRunStartTime
columns.description: Default run start time (CAST from Kennel.DefaultRunStartTime TIME to DATETIME)

columns.name: isFollowing
columns.description: Whether user is following the kennel. Always 1 due to WHERE hkm.Following = 1 filter.

columns.name: appAccessFlags
columns.description: App access flags for the user-kennel relationship from HC.HasherKennelMap

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Device.FcmToken and updatedAt if @fcmToken differs from stored value (conditional, only when token has changed)
INSERT into HC.PortalAccess (hasherId) to log portal access
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
